common.lockedByAnotherAdmin: This record is currently locked by {owner}.
common.lockedByCurrentUserOtherSession: You already locked this record in another browser tab or session.
common.acquireFailed: The edit lock could not be checked. Reload the page and try again.
common.lostLock: You lost the edit lock while editing. Local changes were discarded to prevent conflicts.
common.impersonationHint: Customer impersonation does not acquire or release the administration edit lock. The lock expires automatically when the admin detail page stops sending heartbeats.

bar.idleHint: Lock it before editing so other admins know it is in use.
bar.ownedHint: Lock active until {until}. Click Unlock when you are done so other admins can edit.
bar.ownedElsewhereTitle: You hold this lock in another tab
bar.ownedElsewhereHint: Take the lock over here to edit in this tab.

overview.title: Active edit locks
overview.loadFailed: Could not load active edit locks.
overview.emptySubline: No customer or order is currently locked for editing.
